data.transcription_context: This is an inbound call from a freight carrier looking to book loads. The caller may mention MC numbers (Motor Carrier numbers), DOT numbers, FMCSA (Federal Motor Carrier Safety Administration), freight brokerage terms, equipment types like dry van, flatbed, reefer, step deck, and conestoga. They will reference US city names, state abbreviations, load weights, commodity types, and dollar amounts for rate negotiation.
